biological_replicate: Specifically, we used nematodes carrying a gas‐1 loss‐of‐function allele that was originally isolated in a screening of C. elegans mutant sensitive to volatile anesthetics
experimental_design: IIS inhibition reduces protein synthesis and favors catabolism in mitochondrial deficient Caenorhabditis elegans
Using an unbiased multi‐omics approach, we report here that IIS inhibition reduces protein synthesis and favors catabolism in mitochondrial deficient Caenorhabditis elegans.
factor_value: Inhibition of insulin/IGF‐1 signaling (IIS) represents a promising avenue for the treatment of mitochondrial diseases
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text
number_of_biological_replicates: A total of five biological replicates per condition were collected.
number_of_samples: A total of five biological replicates per condition were collected.
